items.title: If You'd Invested $1,000 in the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO) 10 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
items.author: Matt Frankel
items.description: A $1,000 investment in the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF a decade ago would now be worth $4,100, representing an annualized return of about 15%, largely driven by large-cap technology stocks.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Demonstrated strong 15% annualized returns over a decade, significantly outperforming historical average market returns
